untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 1-standard-deviation breakout from 10-day mean with real-time auto-execution trigger. Standard deviation calculation and 'breakout breach' detection logic are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also specifies pre-authorized position sizing and simultaneous alert/execution mechanics which are operational/risk-management rules outside the scope of price-action indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using sma_10 as the 10-day mean reference and atr_14 as volatility proxy, but this does not capture the exact 1-std-dev range threshold required. The core 'breakout outside range' condition cannot be precisely translated without a rolling standard deviation indicator. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal uses bidirectional breakout logic. Exit condition uses range mean (approximated as sma_10) with trailing stop concept partially captured via stop_loss_pct.
